output:
# RFP Response — The Westmore Hotel Dallas

**Submitted to:** Acme Logistics Corp, Travel & Procurement
**RFP Reference:** ACME-2026-DAL-005
**Submitted:** May 9, 2026 — 10:00 AM CT

## Executive Summary
The Westmore Hotel Dallas is pleased to submit a Local Negotiated Rate proposal for Acme Logistics Corp's 2026 program. As a 220-room independent boutique three blocks from the Dallas Convention Center, we are uniquely positioned to support Acme's weekday corporate travel — with the flexibility, service depth, and Sun–Tue availability that the larger downtown chains can't consistently offer.

## Property Overview
- 220 keys, all king or king-suite
- 4 banquet halls (max 600 pax) for any Acme team gatherings
- In-house and outdoor catering
- Rooftop restaurant, lobby bar, fitness center, business center
- Walking distance to AT&T HQ, Convention Center, and Pearl/Arts District

## Proposed Rate Structure (USD)
| Tier | Annual RNs | LRA Rate | Dynamic Discount |
|---|---|---|---|
| Tier A | 100–249 | $179 | 6% off BAR |
| Tier B | 250–499 | $172 | 8% off BAR |
| Tier C | 500+ | $165 | 10% off BAR |

All rates are **net of taxes**, last-room availability, valid Sunday through Thursday. Friday/Saturday at BAR less 5%. Sales tax is currently 13% (state + city + occupancy).

## Inclusions
- Complimentary high-speed Wi-Fi
- Daily American breakfast for primary guest
- Self-parking included
- Loyalty enrollment (free elite night credit on every stay)
- 24-hour gym access

## Sustainability & DEI
The Westmore is a certified Texas Green Lodging property. We source 70% of F&B from within 250 miles, run a single-use plastics elimination program, and report quarterly on Scope 1 + 2 emissions. Our leadership team is 50% women and minority-led; supplier diversity program is publicly disclosed.

## Why Westmore
1. **Sun–Tue priority** — your weekday teams get our best service when downtown is quietest
2. **Independent flexibility** — direct line to the GM, contracts adjusted in days not weeks
3. **Long-stay ready** — kitchenettes, weekly housekeeping cycle, project rate option for 7+ nights

## Next Steps
We propose a 30-minute kickoff call the week of May 19 (CT) to align on dates, contact protocols, and reporting cadence. Single point of contact: Sales Director, +1 (214) 555-0124.

We look forward to earning Acme Logistics' business in 2026.
